subcodes.first_line: O thou who soarest in the atmosphere of love for thy Lord, the Chosen One! Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the direction of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر فی هوآء حب ربک المختار ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر ربک
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
